goal: P1 infrastructure fix: remove Electron-style audio init blocking from active flow behavior and unify audio/image asset path usage through shared helpers.
constraints: Do not add new gameplay features or alter battle rules.
Keep changes focused on audio initialization/feedback reliability and asset path consistency.
Prefer minimal diffs in active mainline files; do not revive legacy entry flow.
deliverables: Active app flow initializes uiAudio and baseline SFX volume without runtime-flavor early returns.
Shared asset helper usage is standardized for screen-level media path building.
Audio manager avoids redundant custom sound fetch/decode and handles initialization safely.
